content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — User-visible UI string labels the AI Sort feature as "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" (App/SettingsView.swift:12), which may trigger review questions about shipping unfinished functionality.
Pierre: Apple rejects apps under 2.2 when the shipped build presents itself as incomplete or a trial — a released feature explicitly marked "Experimental" and "unstable" can read that way to a reviewer, especially since release_notes.txt highlights this exact feature. Store metadata itself is clean (description.txt and release_notes.txt contain no beta/test wording). Consider rewording the caption to a neutral disclaimer (e.g. "AI Sort may occasionally change your sort order") or finish stabilizing the feature before submission.
